description: PhantomBuster automates lead generation and outreach by extracting real-time data from LinkedIn and other platforms.
tagline: A new era of lead generation
overview: PhantomBuster automates lead generation, data extraction, and outreach, pulling real-time data from LinkedIn and other platforms to find and engage high-intent leads.
what_is: PhantomBuster is a web automation tool for lead generation and data extraction. It collects real-time data from more than 15 platforms, including LinkedIn, to surface leads and enrich lists with data points for sharper targeting.

It is strong for sales prospecting, social engagement, and personalized outreach, including automated LinkedIn messaging and engagement tracking, often producing leads within minutes of setup. It syncs lead data into CRMs like HubSpot to keep outreach organized.
PhantomBuster is built for quality, rule-respecting automation rather than bulk spam or fake profiles, making it a fit for data-driven growth teams.
